title: McBunneh CPVP Essentials!
description: Tired of big fire , big totem pops , ugly textures? This texture pack can solve it. This pack improves , fire , totems , fps and nether. This is 100% the best crystal pvp back there is! Download it now to improve!
body: This CPVP pack is built for maximum performance and clean visuals. With a smooth UI, clear textures, and zero distractions, it helps you stay focused and dominate every fight. If you want faster reactions, better visibility, and a pack that feels right, this is the one to download.
